Class RoomCreateController

java.lang.Object
io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.controller.room.RoomCreateController
public final class RoomCreateController extends Object
Controller used for creating rooms.

  • Constructor Details

    • RoomCreateController

      public RoomCreateController(RoomModel roomModel, Consumer<Room> action, String buttonText)
      Returns a new instance of the RoomCreateController.
      Parameters:
      roomModel - The model which will be bound to the ui.
      action - The Consumer action that happens when the button is pressed so it can be used for updating and creating.
      buttonText - The String that will be used as button text.

  • Method Details

    • getRoomModel

      public RoomModel getRoomModel()
      Returns the RoomModel passed to the constructor.
      Returns:
      The RoomModel.
